name: Infoinlet Content Creation
description: Content Creation using Open Ai and formatted and then save to database

data.label: Chat Completion
data.description: Create a chat completion using GPT models (gpt-4, gpt-3.5-turbo, etc.)

model.label: Model
model.description: The model to use for chat completion

messages.label: Messages
messages.description: Array of message objects for the conversation

maxTokens.label: Max Tokens
maxTokens.description: Maximum number of tokens to generate

temperature.label: Temperature
temperature.description: Controls randomness (0-2). Lower is more deterministic

actionParams.messages: {   "prompt": "Universal Social Media Content Generator Prompt",   "instructions": {     "task": "Generate social media content in the following JSON format:",     "output_format": "result":{       "facebook": "Attractive Facebook post with a friendly tone. Include 5–8 engaging hashtags.",       "linkedin": "Formal, professional LinkedIn post. Include 4–6 relevant hashtags.",       "twitter": "Short tweet under 280 characters. Catchy tone. Include 3–5 concise hashtags."     },     "content_topic": "{YOUR TOPIC HERE}",     "rules": [       "Facebook: friendly, engaging, marketing style.",       "LinkedIn: formal, polished, value-driven content.",       "Twitter: concise, impactful, under 280 characters.",       "Use hashtags that are relevant, clean, and professional.",       "Avoid repeating hashtags across platforms unless necessary.",       "Do NOT include emojis unless I specify."     ],     "example_topic": "Launching my new SaaS product DeskTrack – a smart office management tool."   } }

data.label: Run Code

lastResult.twitter: Ignite productivity with our new SaaS product: DeskTrack – the smart office management tool of the future. #DeskTrack #WorkSmart #Productivity
lastResult.facebook: We are beyond excited to unleash DeskTrack: the smart office management tool to optimize your productivity and transform your workspace! Let's join hands and make work smarter, not harder! #smartOffice #DeskTrack #ProductivityTools #OfficeManagement #WorkSmart #NewLaunch
lastResult.linkedin: Introducing DeskTrack, a cutting-edge office management SaaS product designed to bolster productivity and streamline your workspace. Lead your team more efficiently with DeskTrack. #ProductivityOptimization #OfficeManagement #DeskTrack #SaaS #Leadership
